articles.author: Lucas Ropek
articles.title: Apple and Google ordered to purge ‘nudify’ apps from App Stores - TechCrunch
articles.description: In letters sent to Apple and Google, San Francisco City Attorney David Chiu said that both companies have long been aware that they are hosting apps in violation of state law.
articles.content:
The city of San Francisco has ordered Apple and Google to remove dozens of “nudify” apps software programs that can digitally alter pictures to unclothe the people in them from their app stores.
